description_long: This is a dark brown ceramic cup with a cylindrical body and a rounded lip, featuring a sturdy, curved handle attached to one side. The front of the cup displays a blue rectangular label with bold, distressed black text reading 'Lame Theme Inc.' The surface of the cup is matte with subtle imperfections and small spots, giving it a slightly worn, utilitarian appearance. The handle is thick and ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip. The interior appears to be the same material and color as the exterior, with a smooth, unadorned finish. This cup is typical of those found in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public spaces, and is designed for holding beverages.
description: A dark brown ceramic cup with a blue label reading 'Lame Theme Inc.' and a thick, curved handle. The surface is matte and slightly worn, suitable for holding drinks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue label with 'Lame Theme Inc.' text and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle centered and only the edge of the blue label visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, unadorned back of the cup and the handle on the left.
description_view_3: Angled rear view with a partial glimpse of the blue label and the plain surface dominating.
